bigquery.label: BigQuery focus
bigquery.plan_line: BigQuery for live metrics and warehouse-backed evidence (incl. GA4/GSC exports).
bigquery.base_notes: Query BigQuery via the Google-managed BigQuery MCP server. Discover datasets and tables live before querying. Prefer the read-only query path (execute_sql_readonly); read-only is ultimately enforced by IAM — grant BigQuery Data Viewer + Job User + MCP Tool User (roles/mcp.toolUser), no Data Editor (see SETUP.md). SELECT-only; never run DML/DDL. If GA4 or GSC BigQuery exports exist, query them here as the default analytics path.
